description: You are a GIS analyst at a metropolitan planning organization. The geospatial data processing pipeline used for the city's zoning compliance analysis is producing incorrect results. Map overlays are misaligned, area calculations don't match surveyor reports, and the exported GeoJSON files are being rejected by the city's web mapping portal. The pipeline code is at /home/ga/workspace/geospatial_pipeline/. Fix all issues so the pipeline produces correct, standards-compliant output.
